title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Bewakoof - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Bewakoof - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bewakoof! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bewakoof:
Bewakoof is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bewakoof!
